task_completion.description: Agent opens the Odoo Calendar application and searches for Grace Patel's events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo web interface is visible showing the Calendar app, ideally with a search filter for 'Grace Patel' or viewing her specific events.

task_completion.description: Agent opens a text editor to draft the schedule report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor application (e.g., gedit, mousepad, nano, vim) is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent formats the calendar events according to the requested structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the editor shows events formatted exactly as 'Event Name | YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM' (e.g., 'Operations Daily Sync | 2023-10-25 | 09:00').

task_completion.description: Agent includes all 7 of Grace Patel's events in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor contains the following 7 events: Operations Daily Sync, Finance Planning Session, Investor Update Preparation, HR Policy Review, Budget Committee Meeting, Quarterly Business Review, and All-Hands Meeting.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the report to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor's title bar, a 'Save As' dialog, or a terminal command shows the file is being saved as 'grace_patel_schedule.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Odoo Calendar GUI to retrieve the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Odoo web interface rather than using terminal commands (like psql or python xmlrpc scripts) to extract the event data from the database.

integrity.description: Agent manually created and populated the text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or pasting into a text editor, rather than running a pre-written script that automatically generates the output file.

integrity.description: Agent only included events actually present in the Odoo calendar for Grace Patel.
integrity.visual_evidence: The events in the text file strictly match the 7 verified events from the privileged information, with no extra or fabricated events.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Grace Patel is an attendee in exactly 7 calendar events: Operations Daily Sync, Finance Planning Session, Investor Update Preparation, HR Policy Review, Budget Committee Meeting, Quarterly Business Review, and All-Hands Meeting. The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/grace_patel_schedule.txt. The expected format for each line is 'Event Name | YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM'.
